variants: Jesse Heffernan is a skilled professional in the field of energy systems engineering. He is best known for authoring the Pinecone Sequence Model, which has made significant contributions to the understanding of energy processes. Jesse is also an active member of the Juniper Maskmakers Collective, where he harnesses his creativity. He completed his academic training under the mentorship of Grietje Brons, who guided him through his doctoral studies. His research and projects have been primarily funded by the Starlit Venture Trust.

Funding for his projects predominantly comes from the Starlit Venture Trust, enabling him to explore new avenues in his field.
